title: installed-lifecycle-apply

sources.reason: Approved lifecycle plan and prior read-only Proposal implementation define the apply boundary.
Defines confirmation options, drift protection, transaction order, and Summary requirements.
Proposal schema and classification output consumed by apply.
Validated manifest, digest, and rollback baseline facts.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial execution; apply is explicitly confirmation-gated and fail-closed.

preReviewWarnings: Apply must never write before confirmation, must detect repository drift, and must preserve project-owned content.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Proposal consumption defaults to needs_human_confirmation and exposes apply-safe, exclude, cancel, target-version, migration-review, and return options.

Apply performs Drift, Snapshot, Safe Files, New Files, Removed Files, Shared Regions, Project-owned retention, Migration handoff, Generated regeneration, Manifest, Integrity, Readiness, Smoke Test, and Summary steps in order.
Confirmation is required before any write; unresolved drift or conflict fails closed without overwriting.
Tests cover zero-write confirmation, safe apply, cancel, drift, unresolved conflicts, interruption recovery, and Summary binding.
CLI/Make and lifecycle documentation describe the confirmation and transactional boundaries.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: A reviewed update proposal must be applied only after explicit confirmation, repository drift detection, and a rollback snapshot; otherwise an update can overwrite project work or leave a partially changed installation.
constraints: Require a structured confirmation marker before writes.
Fail closed on manifest drift, conflicts, missing snapshots, or malformed proposals.
Preserve project-owned and historical files; shared content requires explicit managed-region evidence.
Record ordered steps and interruption state for resume.
intent.rationale: Separating proposal, confirmation, and transactional apply makes the mutation boundary auditable and recoverable.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement a confirmation-gated, drift-safe installed lifecycle update apply boundary.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Proposal is shown as needs_human_confirmation and confirmation options are explicit
scenarioCoverage.reason: Plan and focused test define the confirmation boundary.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Repository drift or unresolved conflict fails closed
Confirmed apply updates only safe/new files and preserves project-owned content
Interrupted apply records resumable ordered state

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial lifecycle plan, including Makefile and governance changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
